title: Mobile Health Care App — Alternative Theme (Design B) Frontend

requirements.summary: Implement a complete, consistent Design B theme (warm green + neutrals, non-blue/purple) with coherent typography, spacing, surfaces, and component styling across the app UI.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly distinct theme from a typical default template is applied (colors, type scale, surfaces, buttons, inputs, cards).
All user-facing text is in English.
Styling is consistent across screens (no mixed palettes or mismatched typography).

file_operations.description: Create global styles for the app including Design B tokens (CSS variables for colors/surfaces/typography/radius/shadows) and a theme-scoping mechanism (e.g., a theme class/data-attribute) to avoid editing immutable files.

Adjust Tailwind theme extensions (as needed) to support Design B styling via CSS variables (e.g., additional semantic tokens/shadows/radius/typography scale) while keeping all user-facing UI consistent. Use shadcn-ui token patterns where applicable; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Define Design B theme metadata (palette names, font stack recommendations, spacing scale constants) and utilities to apply the theme at runtime without touching immutable paths.

Create a small wrapper component to standardize Design B surfaces (screen background, cards, subtle borders, elevation) composed from existing shadcn-ui primitives; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create typography helpers (page title, section title, caption, body) to keep Design B type scale consistent across all screens; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create a navigable Design B screen set (Welcome/Onboarding, Sign In, Home/Dashboard, Profile) using realistic placeholder content and in-app navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the listed screens exists and can be navigated to from within the app.
Screens use realistic placeholder content (names, dates, specialties) without requiring backend integration.
No broken navigation links; route changes render the correct screen.

file_operations.description: Create the app root component that wires routing, the Design B layout shell, and in-app navigation (tabs/header) to ensure all required screens are reachable.
Create the Design B layout shell with a consistent header and bottom tab navigation, composed from existing shadcn-ui components; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement bottom tab navigation (e.g., Home, Profile) with Design B styling and active-state rules. Use existing shadcn-ui Button components for tab items; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the Welcome/Onboarding screen using Design B hero illustration, logo mark, and clear English copy demonstrating Design B surfaces/typography; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the Sign In screen using Design B form styling (inputs, buttons, helper text) with realistic placeholder content (email, password). Compose shadcn-ui Input/Button/Card; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the Home/Dashboard screen with realistic placeholder modules (quick actions, vitals summary) and Design B component styling. Use shadcn-ui Card/Badge/Button; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the Profile screen with realistic user info, preferences, and a section that demonstrates Design B styling. Compose shadcn-ui Card/Avatar/Button; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add centralized realistic placeholder data (user profile, health metrics) used across screens to keep content consistent and English-only.

requirements.summary: Add an in-app runtime toggle to switch between Design B and the default design without editing immutable template files.
acceptanceCriteria: A user can switch to view Design B styling/layout during runtime.
The switcher does not require changes to immutable paths (e.g., hooks and UI component source directories marked read-only).

file_operations.description: Create a lightweight theme context/provider to track the selected theme (default vs Design B) and apply it at runtime via a non-immutable wrapper (e.g., in App).
Create a simple toggle control for switching themes in-app. Use shadcn-ui Switch and/or Button components; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the ThemeSwitcher into the UI (e.g., header/profile) and apply the chosen theme (e.g., set a theme class/data-attribute on an app wrapper element) so switching updates Design B styling during runtime.
Persist the user’s theme selection locally (e.g., localStorage) so Design B remains active after refresh without touching immutable template files.

requirements.summary: Add required static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in Design B UI screens without backend fetching.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at the specified paths under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Design B screens render the images correctly without fetching them from the backend.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static image asset: Minimal healthcare app logo mark, rounded geometry, warm green + neutral palette.
Add the generated static image asset: Welcoming hero illustration (clinician and patient, calm clinic, flat/soft gradient, warm green palette).
Add the generated static image asset: Sprite sheet/set image containing 6 simple line icons (doctor, calendar, heart, pills, chat bubble, user profile) with consistent stroke width.

Wire frontend/public/assets/generated/healthcare-logo.dim_512x512.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/healthcare-hero.dim_1600x900.png into the Welcome/Onboarding screen UI so they render as static assets (no backend fetch).
Use frontend/public/assets/generated/healthcare-icons.dim_512x512.png in the Home/Dashboard screen (e.g., for quick-action visuals) to demonstrate Design B iconography without backend fetching.
Optionally reuse frontend/public/assets/generated/healthcare-icons.dim_512x512.png as tab icons (or partial crops as appropriate) to keep Design B navigation visually consistent.
